title: Feedback & Performance Reviews - 50 Phrases
definition: 50 phrases for giving and receiving feedback, and navigating performance review conversations professionally.

phrases.phrase: I wanted to call out your work on this
phrases.example: I wanted to call out your work on this project.

phrases.phrase: You really nailed this one
phrases.example: You really nailed this one - great presentation.

phrases.phrase: This is exactly the level of quality we need
phrases.example: This is exactly the level of quality we need going forward.

phrases.phrase: Keep doing what you're doing
phrases.example: Keep doing what you're doing, it's working well.

phrases.phrase: Your attention to detail really shows
phrases.example: Your attention to detail really shows in this report.

phrases.phrase: I've noticed real improvement here
phrases.example: I've noticed real improvement here since last quarter.

phrases.phrase: This is a great example for others to follow
phrases.meaning: Highlights work as a model for the team.
phrases.example: This is a great example for others to follow.

phrases.phrase: You went above and beyond on this
phrases.example: You went above and beyond on this deadline.

phrases.phrase: I'm impressed with how you handled that
phrases.example: I'm impressed with how you handled that client escalation.

phrases.phrase: Your contribution made a real difference
phrases.example: Your contribution made a real difference to the launch.

phrases.phrase: This reflects really well on you
phrases.meaning: Notes positive impact on someone's reputation.
phrases.example: This reflects really well on you and the team.

phrases.phrase: I'd like to recognize your work publicly
phrases.meaning: Offers to highlight achievement to a wider audience.
phrases.example: I'd like to recognize your work publicly at the town hall.

phrases.phrase: You're setting a great example for the team
phrases.example: You're setting a great example for the team.

phrases.phrase: There's room for improvement here
phrases.meaning: Politely notes an area needing work.
phrases.example: There's room for improvement here in terms of clarity.

phrases.phrase: Let's talk about what could go better next time
phrases.example: Let's talk about what could go better next time.

phrases.phrase: I'd like to see more consistency in...
phrases.meaning: Notes a need for more reliable performance.
phrases.example: I'd like to see more consistency in your reporting.

phrases.phrase: This didn't quite land the way we hoped
phrases.example: This didn't quite land the way we hoped with the client.

phrases.phrase: Let's dig into what happened here
phrases.meaning: Investigates the cause of an issue.
phrases.example: Let's dig into what happened here to avoid repeating it.

phrases.phrase: I think there's a gap between the goal and the result
phrases.meaning: Notes a discrepancy between expectation and outcome.
phrases.example: I think there's a gap between the goal and the result here.

phrases.phrase: Can we talk through what got in the way?
phrases.example: Can we talk through what got in the way of the deadline?

phrases.phrase: I want to be direct with you about this
phrases.example: I want to be direct with you about this concern.

phrases.phrase: This needs more attention going forward
phrases.meaning: Notes an area requiring more focus.
phrases.example: This needs more attention going forward, please.

phrases.phrase: Let's set a clearer benchmark for next time
phrases.example: Let's set a clearer benchmark for next time.

phrases.phrase: I noticed a pattern I want to address
phrases.example: I noticed a pattern I want to address around deadlines.

phrases.phrase: This wasn't up to your usual standard
phrases.meaning: Notes work fell below someone's typical quality.
phrases.example: This wasn't up to your usual standard, is everything okay?

phrases.phrase: Let's work on this together going forward
phrases.example: Let's work on this together going forward.

phrases.phrase: I want to help you get to the next level
phrases.example: I want to help you get to the next level in your role.

phrases.phrase: This is an area of opportunity for you
phrases.meaning: A softer way to note a weakness.
phrases.example: This is an area of opportunity for you this year.

phrases.phrase: Let's identify what's causing the gap
phrases.meaning: Investigates the root cause of underperformance.
phrases.example: Let's identify what's causing the gap in output.

phrases.phrase: I believe you're capable of more than this
phrases.example: I believe you're capable of more than this - let's talk.

phrases.phrase: Thank you for the honest feedback
phrases.example: Thank you for the honest feedback, I'll work on it.

phrases.phrase: I appreciate you telling me directly
phrases.example: I appreciate you telling me directly instead of avoiding it.

phrases.phrase: That's fair, I can see where I fell short
phrases.example: That's fair, I can see where I fell short on this one.

phrases.phrase: Can you give me a specific example?
phrases.meaning: Asks for clarity on vague feedback.
phrases.example: Can you give me a specific example of what you mean?

phrases.phrase: I'll take this on board
phrases.example: I'll take this on board and adjust my approach.

phrases.phrase: What would you suggest I do differently?
phrases.example: What would you suggest I do differently next time?

phrases.phrase: I hear you, and I'll work on it
phrases.example: I hear you, and I'll work on it starting now.

phrases.phrase: This is helpful, thank you for sharing
phrases.example: This is helpful, thank you for sharing your perspective.

phrases.phrase: I want to understand this better
phrases.example: I want to understand this better so I can improve.

phrases.phrase: Let me reflect on this and follow up
phrases.meaning: Takes time to process feedback before responding.
phrases.example: Let me reflect on this and follow up with you tomorrow.

phrases.phrase: I appreciate you taking the time to share this
phrases.meaning: Thanks someone for investing effort in feedback.
phrases.example: I appreciate you taking the time to share this with me.

phrases.phrase: How can I demonstrate improvement here?
phrases.meaning: Asks how to show growth in a specific area.
phrases.example: How can I demonstrate improvement here going forward?

phrases.phrase: I want to set some goals based on this feedback
phrases.example: I want to set some goals based on this feedback.

phrases.phrase: This aligns with what I've been thinking too
phrases.example: This aligns with what I've been thinking too, honestly.

phrases.phrase: I'll check back in with you on my progress
phrases.meaning: Commits to a future update on improvement.
phrases.example: I'll check back in with you on my progress next month.

phrases.phrase: Thank you for believing in my potential
phrases.meaning: Expresses gratitude for encouragement alongside feedback.
phrases.example: Thank you for believing in my potential to grow here.

phrases.phrase: I'm glad we're having this conversation
phrases.example: I'm glad we're having this conversation, it's useful.

phrases.phrase: Noted, I'll make the adjustment
phrases.meaning: A brief, direct acknowledgment of feedback.
phrases.example: Noted, I'll make the adjustment for next time.

phrases.phrase: I want to make sure I'm meeting expectations
phrases.example: I want to make sure I'm meeting expectations going forward.

phrases.phrase: Let's revisit this in our next one-on-one
phrases.meaning: Suggests following up on feedback later.
phrases.example: Let's revisit this in our next one-on-one.

quiz.question: Which phrase softly notes a recurring performance issue?
options: I noticed a pattern I want to address
Thank you for the honest feedback
Let's revisit this in our next one-on-one
quiz.answer: I noticed a pattern I want to address
quiz.explanation: This points out a recurring issue in a professional tone.

quiz.question: Which phrase asks for concrete detail on vague feedback?
options: Can you give me a specific example?
This is exactly the level of quality we need
Let's set a clearer benchmark for next time
quiz.answer: Can you give me a specific example?
quiz.explanation: This requests concrete detail to clarify vague feedback.

quiz.question: Which phrase acknowledges valid criticism gracefully?
options: That's fair, I can see where I fell short
You went above and beyond on this
I want to be direct with you about this
This needs more attention going forward
quiz.answer: That's fair, I can see where I fell short
quiz.explanation: This gracefully accepts valid criticism without being defensive.

quiz.question: I'll take this ___ and adjust my approach. (consider it)
quiz.explanation: 'Take on board' means to accept and consider feedback seriously.

quiz.question: Which phrase frames a weakness in a softer, growth-oriented way?
options: This is an area of opportunity for you
This wasn't up to your usual standard
I need to hold you accountable for this
I think there's a gap between the goal and the result
quiz.answer: This is an area of opportunity for you
quiz.explanation: This frames a weakness positively as a growth opportunity.
